creator: antumdeluge@gmail.com
text:
hexchat will not shutdown when I log out (without restarting) of my desktop (LXDE/Openbox) into the GDM login manager. If I log back in hexchat is still running, but, in the background. There is no icon in the panel's system tray. If I start hexchat again it joins the servers using an alternate nick & I can see my default nick is still in the channels. To shutdown hexchat after logging back in I use the command "killall hexchat" or kill it from a task manager.


Possible related ports:

irc/hexchat
x11/lxde-meta
x11-wm/openbox
